test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Every decision identifies a supported Builder decision and source owner.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Priority exposes material factors and never relies on an unexplained score.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: High-impact actions require configured human approval.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: A recorded decision requires owner, rationale, evidence snapshot, and expected outcome.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Completed approval history and evidence snapshots are append-only.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Overdue decisions escalate only through a declared policy.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Outcome capture never rewrites the original expectation.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: AI confidence cannot grant authority.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.
